pilot_ready_routes: segregated battery storage and collection trial

future_watch_routes.route: critical raw material recovery and advanced battery recycling
future_watch_routes.claim_boundary: Do not claim material recovery without authorised recycler and documented treatment outcome.

supplier_questions: Can you accept batteries or packs back?
What chemistry, condition and packaging rules apply?
What safety requirements apply before collection?
unsafe_claims: recycling achieved without authorised recycler evidence
critical material recovery without treatment evidence
default_claim_boundary: Human/EHS review required. No circular or recovery claim until authorised handling and treatment evidence exists.
